default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's brand identity development process and align on next steps for finalizing the brand narrative and visual direction.](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jean has developed extensive brand identity concepts but lacks clear narrative/positioning guidance from leadership](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Current aesthetic direction is minimalist/"anti-hype", but may evolve based on upcoming narrative exercise](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Renato will lead a session to define overarching brand narrative, which will inform final visual identity decisions](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Jean will continue as lead designer, with Renato providing narrative framework and some production support](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)

## Topics

### Brand Development Process

  - [Jean attempted to gather input from various stakeholders but was limited to working mainly with Edwin](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Developed mood boards, competitor analysis, and multiple visual identity concepts](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Lacked clear narrative/positioning guidance, making it challenging to finalize direction](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Two main visual directions explored: minimalist "anti-hype" and more abstract/conceptual](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### Current Visual Identity Elements

  - [Wordmark: Custom typography favored over symbol, with potential for ligature to add uniqueness](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Color: Primarily black and white, but need to define full palette and grade system](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [Typography: Currently using Helvetica on site; considering monospace and possibly modern serif options](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Imagery: Guidelines needed for stock photography and AI-generated visuals](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

### Next Steps for Brand Finalization

  - [Renato to lead narrative development session with leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Jean to interpret narrative outcomes into visual identity refinements](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Potential follow-up session between Renato and Jean to align narrative and visuals](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Jean to lead final visual identity execution, with some production support from Renato's team if needed](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)

### Collaboration Dynamics

  - [Jean is eager to dedicate more time to the project once given clear direction](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Renato clarified roles: he'll provide narrative framework, Jean leads visual execution](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
  - [Both expressed enthusiasm for collaboration and leveraging respective strengths](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule narrative development session (tentatively Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
  - [Renato to keep Jean updated on session timing and outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Post-session alignment meeting between Renato and Jean to interpret narrative visually](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
  - [Jean to refine visual identity based on new narrative framework](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Determine any additional production support needed for rapid execution](https://fathom.video/share/wkbdfUm_gB-CY6HcUfE-sDzTzc_vyZub?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
